programme.title: Humble Maria
programme.desc: A brave, poor young girl is welcomed into a rich family and develops a romance with their misogynist youngest son, driving a woman already in love with him to go to great lengths to destroy their relationship.

programme.title: La espinita del amor
programme.desc: María Mercedes, a poor girl who sells lottery tickets, meets a rich man who hates his own family and sees in María Mercedes an opportunity to make their lives miserable.

programme.title: Episode #1.72
programme.desc: A man born blind in a remote Colombian village is shunned for his disability. Leandro immerses himself in music and composes vallenato songs, rising to prominence as a legendary composer.

programme.desc: A man born blind in a remote Colombian village is shunned for his disability. Leandro immerses himself in music and composes vallenato songs, rising to prominence as a legendary composer.

programme.title: Tres hombres en mi vida
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Pata de palo
programme.desc: A young woman agrees to marry a lame man to save her grandfather, manager of the station, where there was a train accident.

programme.title: Pueblito
programme.desc: Guillermo arrives to a small town to build a school only to find the local leader (César) opposed to the idea. But convinced by the rural teacher they will try to overcome the odds and manage to build this key place for the children.

programme.title: Un par de sinvergüenzas
programme.desc: Western

programme.title: Tres hombres en mi vida
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Luisito, corazón de plomo
programme.desc: Magda le dice a Luis que no pueden mudarse a su mansión y le pide de vuelta las llaves del departamento, pero él se niega a dejarlos vivir en en edificio otra vez y todos los vecinos tratan de convencerlo de darles otra oportunidad.

programme.title: Vestidos de color de rosa
programme.desc: A country music band from a small Mexican town, created by random bizarre members, strives to achieve fame and fortune.

programme.title: Cazafortunas
programme.desc: Vítor and Albertano are two decent but very conceited best friends who are going for the same goals: to find good jobs, nice places to live, and true love.

programme.title: Somos novios
programme.desc: Vítor and Albertano are two decent but very conceited best friends who are going for the same goals: to find good jobs, nice places to live, and true love.

programme.title: El futbolito
programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: Santos López de Santa Ana
programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: El nuevo administragón
programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: Una familia de cien
programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: San Chambelán
programme.desc: Maria has her Quinceañera party meanwhile Doña Lucha rents out her son's services as chamberlain.

programme.title: Sostengo el Pi
programme.desc: María de todos los Ángeles, ve atentamente un programa de televisión en el que el maestro de yoga da tres consejos básicos del feng shui para atraer la fortuna y el amor, esto provoca que María inmediatamente se ponga a mover muebles y a tirar cosas, al ver esto Carmelito pone el grito en el cielo, hasta que su nieta lo convence de que con esto sencillos cambios podrán atraer la fortuna y el dinero. Delfino y Betsabé llegan a casa de Doña Lucha a cobrar el dinero de una tanda que les debe de tiempo atrás, ésta que también ha visto el programa, y no tiene para pagarles, usa los argumentos de maestro Chuy y los convence de que se inscriban en un curso de feng shui que va a impartir, con lo cual aprovecha para ponerlos a mover los muebles de su casa, hasta que ya cansados deciden abandonar el curso. Como segundo paso Doña Lucha decide escombrar la casa y comienza a tirar cosas de Rosa Aurora, Albertano y del Chino, pero el mono de coco que ella trajo de Acapulco lo vuelve a colocar en el mismo lugar. La euforia por limpiar lleva a las dos familias hasta la azotea en la que se desata un conflicto por el espacio y por el respeto a sus pertenencias.

programme.title: Regalo de aniversario
programme.desc: Con tal de evitar dormir en la bañera, Ludovico debe tener un regalo para Federica antes del día de aniversario.

programme.title: Especial navideño de Bloopers
programme.desc: En este especial de Navidad, se nos muestran los errores de grabación en la serie.

programme.title: Llámeme Francisco
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Más vale mala por conocida
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Perdimos todo
programme.desc: Luis comienza a molestar a Silvia todo el tiempo queriendo controlar lo que hace para cuidar del bebé. Magdalena invierte todo su dinero en una empresa fantasma y pierde todo.

programme.title: Luisito, corazón de plomo
programme.desc: Magda le dice a Luis que no pueden mudarse a su mansión y le pide de vuelta las llaves del departamento, pero él se niega a dejarlos vivir en en edificio otra vez y todos los vecinos tratan de convencerlo de darles otra oportunidad.

programme.desc: Love story between Esmeralda, a poor blind woman, and Jose Armando, a doctor from a rich family.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: An epic love story set in Mexico during the 1740s about a poor girl named Camila and a pirate named Ricardo.

programme.title: The Three Sides of Ana
programme.desc: Three identical triplets with contrasting personalities navigate life and relationships while carrying the weight of a tragic car accident from their past that changed their family forever.

programme.title: Burning for Revenge
programme.desc: The story of three brothers who are looking for revenge but find love.

programme.title: Préstamo o robo
programme.desc: Comedy, Romance, Drama

programme.title: Qué bonito amor
programme.desc: The love story between Emiliano, a young millionaire who is unjustly accused of a crime and Maria, a humble young woman who is the support of her mother and two sisters.

programme.title: Awakenings

programme.title: Spectator Slowing

programme.title: Guerillas in the Mist
programme.desc: Machine gun vaporizes smugglers.

programme.title: Miami Confidential
programme.desc: The team uncovers a meth lab.

programme.title: Raising Caine
programme.desc: Horatio's ex resurfaces.

programme.title: You May Now Kill the Bride
programme.desc: Murder leads the team to a strip club.

programme.title: Ambush
programme.desc: Julia has Horatio arrested for murder.

programme.title: All In
programme.desc: The team races to save Calleigh.

programme.title: La banda del automóvil azul chiclamino
programme.desc: El director Virolo le cuenta a la maestra Manquita que le robaron su carro color azul cliclamino. Los alumnos llegan tarde y Jorgito trae tamales para disculparse.

programme.desc: A group of elite students struggle to pass their third year of high school while also dealing with their many misadventures involving the teachers and the other students of the school.

programme.title: Los campeones justicieros
programme.desc: Five luchadores (Blue Demon, Mil Mascaras, El Medico Asesino, La Sombra Vengadora, Tinieblas plus Black Shadow) face off against a mad scientist and his army of powerful wrestling midgets.

programme.title: Los galleros de Jalisco
programme.desc: Miguel Carrasco se devuelve a su ciudad natal y mata a Juan Huitron, después de que éste lo acusara de homicida. Miguel rechaza huir a pesar de que los hermanos del difunto buscan revancha.

programme.title: Los tres compadres
programme.desc: Un grupo de bandoleros roba el banco de una pequeña localidad en las montañas de México, sometiendo a sus pobladores a las atrocidades del terror.

programme.title: Misterio en las Bermudas
programme.desc: Beautiful Silvia and Sandra disappear mysteriously at the Bermuda Triangle. Santo, Blue Demon and Mil Mascaras go into action to try to find them. Soon they find out that evil Scientist Dr. Gro has developed a device to make people and objects to disappear blaming the famous vanishings of ships, airplanes and human beings on Mother Nature.

programme.title: Los campeones justicieros
programme.desc: Five luchadores (Blue Demon, Mil Mascaras, El Medico Asesino, La Sombra Vengadora, Tinieblas plus Black Shadow) face off against a mad scientist and his army of powerful wrestling midgets.

programme.desc: Miguel Carrasco se devuelve a su ciudad natal y mata a Juan Huitron, después de que éste lo acusara de homicida. Miguel rechaza huir a pesar de que los hermanos del difunto buscan revancha.

programme.title: Vencer el pasado
programme.desc: Four women of different ages and backgrounds confront modern obstacles including social media, illness, romance, reproductive freedom, and the workforce.

programme.title: The Three Sides of Ana
programme.desc: Three identical triplets with contrasting personalities navigate life and relationships while carrying the weight of a tragic car accident from their past that changed their family forever.

programme.title: Lucía defiende a Jacobo de las acusaciones de Johny
programme.desc: Alicia forces Beltrán to go to couple's therapy and he confesses that he is not the man she believes. Johny suspects that Lucía had something to do with Jacobo.

programme.title: ¿Y si yo maté a mi papá y a Julia?
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Abyss of Passion
programme.desc: Childhood friends Elisa, Damian, and Gael meet again as adults and their relationship strains under the weight of their warring families and romantic entanglements.

programme.title: Her Own Destiny
programme.desc: The baby daughter of a mother of five from a poor background is kidnapped, and the mother fights to get her back; as time passes, she rises to a better life with her remaining children.

programme.title: Jesus
programme.desc: Jesus and the apostles go around Judah and Galilee, spreading the gospel of peace and love wherever they go, performing miracles and arousing the wrath of Jewish priests, until Jesus is condemned to crucifixion.

programme.title: Hijos del Monte
programme.desc: Five adopted brothers see how their easygoing life in the countryside is changed by the death of their father, who gives part of his land to his only biological child, Paula, who comes to claim what belongs to her.

programme.desc: Drama
